_description: Editorial subject queue for daily entries. The cron pulls the FIRST item before falling back to the auto-picker. Each item is {subject, query?, notes?}. If the query returns zero Unsplash results, generate-daily.js falls back to the auto-picker. Items pop after each run. KEEP SUBJECTS DISTINCT FROM THE LIVE CATALOG.
_authoring_notes: VERIFY Unsplash has results for `query` before queueing.
Use the canonical 'Noun, Qualifier' form; do not queue a synonym of an existing entry (cement mixer == concrete mixer; double bass == bass).
